'''vamana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroelastoma|fibroelastoma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroelastoma|fibroelastoma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vamana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || væmænæth || væmænæj || væmænæsh || væmænæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vamamanath || vamamanaj || vamamanash || vamamana
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vamanath || vamanaj || vamanash || vamana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vamafnafth || vamafnafj || vamafnafsh || vamafnaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vamanatha || vamanaja || vamanasha || vamanaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || vamanath || vamanaj || vamanash || vamana
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vamanathal || vamanajal || vamanashal || vamanakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vamanaathatha || vamanaajaja || vamanaashasha || vamanaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || vamanathan || vamanajan || vamanashan || vamanakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vamanathaoro || vamanajaoro || vamanashaoro || vamanakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
